title: calonema lindleyanum
intro: Calonema lindleyanum, also known as the Indian coral tree, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayas and parts of India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Calonema lindleyanum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Calonema lindleyanum typically involve the use of its roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
